summary: Quality integration for Chapter 18 ('The Taxonomy of Choice') completed. All three child agents passed: voice maintainer (0 corrections, exceptional Lirien voice), continuity integrator (42 checks, 0 corrections, 3 minor observations), craft enforcer (16/16 tools verified, 0 violations, 3 minor observations). Draft verified at 4,915 words, 267 lines, 3 scenes (SCN-50, SCN-51, SCN-52) all present and complete. The craft-enforcer's initial stale report (which falsely flagged SCN-51 as absent due to a sed extraction bug) has been self-corrected and the current on-disk report accurately reflects the complete draft. All reports are internally consistent and cross-validate against the actual prose. Chapter 18 is cleared for the drafting auditor gate.

voiceConsistency.details: Exceptional Lirien voice across all 3 scenes. 21 classification framework instances form the chapter's structural spine. 10 water/current metaphors, 0 stone/architecture violations. Classification-before-feeling emotional register maintained throughout. Unmistakable POV identification within sentence 1. Maximum distinction from Ch17 Kaelith. Zero corrections required.

continuityVerification.details: 42 verification checks performed. Timeline correctly parallel with Ch17. Bond mechanics meticulously consistent with MAG-007. Oathbrand removal accurately references Ch11/Tessen's shelter. Zero knowledge leaks (INV-056). 4 new information asymmetries correctly established. 3 minor observations, none blocking.

craftToolCompliance.details: 48 tool-x-scene checks performed. Strongest applications: T20 (12-beat emotional throughline), T17 (classification framework as narrative structure), T24 (multi-layered intelligence exchange subtext). 3 minor observations, none blocking.

outlineCompliance.details: All 3 scenes deliver their outlined goals. SCN-50: dark night with Oathbrand proof. SCN-51: Ashborne intelligence. SCN-52: cipher destruction and free choice. Value shifts achieved. Five Commandments satisfied.

proseQualityMetrics.details: Chapter is among the manuscript's best work. Self-interrogation ledger is intellectually rigorous and emotionally devastating. 'She was choosing the love' — plainest line carrying highest emotional charge after 4,900 words of analytical containment.

craftEnforcer.staleReportNote: Initial report incorrectly flagged SCN-51 as absent due to flawed sed extraction. Self-corrected. Current on-disk report is the corrected version.

povVoiceMaintainer.summary: Exceptional Lirien voice with zero corrections. 3 non-blocking observations.

minorFindings.description: Chapter outline references 'Ch8' for Oathbrand removal but removal occurred in Ch11. Draft correctly says 'Tessen's shelter'. Outline metadata needs correction.
Closing 'the bond transmitted Lirien's direction' could be read as spatial. Defensible: preceded by 'Intention' framing, parallels Ch17 emotional-quality bond perception.
FACT-012 attributes Lirien learning Seep's strategic position in Ch18. Draft shows cipher self-destruction, not explicit Seep position learning. May be premature.
Motif registry needs Ch18 appearance update (10 water/current, Pallor evolution, Quietus convergence).
Active mystery box count at 11 exceeds 3-7 target. Systemic from Ch16. Ch18 reduces count by closing MB-012. Resolution cascade in Ch19-22 will address.

craftEnforcerStaleReportAssessment.issue: Initial craft-enforcement-report.json falsely claimed SCN-51 was absent
craftEnforcerStaleReportAssessment.cause: sed command stripped content between --- delimiters (scene breaks identical to YAML frontmatter markers)
craftEnforcerStaleReportAssessment.resolution: Craft-enforcer self-corrected with complete line-by-line re-read. Current report is corrected version with priorReportRetraction field.

draftingAuditorReadiness.rationale: All three quality gates passed. Zero critical or major issues. Five minor findings, none blocking. Draft complete at 4,915 words across 3 scenes. Chapter 18 meets quality standards for the drafting auditor gate.
qualityHighlights: Self-interrogation ledger mechanism — intellectually rigorous and emotionally devastating
Voice distinction from Ch17 Kaelith — unmistakable within sentence 1
Bond mechanics impeccably consistent — explicit MAG-007 restatement in prose
Information asymmetry flawless — 4 new asymmetries, zero knowledge leaks
Closing line maximum emotional charge through maximum simplicity

metadata.verificationMethod: Cross-reference of 3 child agent reports against actual draft, metadata, and outline. Line-number spot-checks on craft report citations. Scene structure verified.
